ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was deleted (soft delete) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is active or not */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the product (public, private, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the product variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the product variant */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant was deleted (soft delete) */,
  "ean" TEXT /* European Article Number (EAN) of the variant */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code (UPC) of the variant */,
  "gtin" TEXT /* Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product variant the price belongs to */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., eur, usd) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Price amount in the specified currency */,
  "min_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity for the price to apply */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity for the price to apply */,
  "price_list_id" TEXT /* Reference to the price list the price belongs to */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Reference to the region the price applies to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the price was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the price was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the price was deleted (soft delete) */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to the price */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage applied to the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_price_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_list_id") REFERENCES price_lists ("price_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_currency_code FOREIGN KEY ("currency_code") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Unique currency code (e.g., eur, usd) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., €, $) */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the region */,
  "vat_rate" TEXT /* Value-Added Tax (VAT) rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_lists" (
  "price_list_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each price list */,
  "price_list_name" TEXT /* Name of the price list */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the price list */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date and time the price list becomes valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date and time the price list expires */,
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment the price list belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_lists_customer_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("customer_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product variant the inventory belongs to */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Reference to the region the inventory applies to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variant in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was deleted (soft delete) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the product variant */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity of the product variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each price change */,
  "price_id" TEXT /* Reference to the price that was changed */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product variant the price belongs to */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., eur, usd) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Price amount in the specified currency */,
  "min_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity for the price to apply */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity for the price to apply */,
  "price_list_id" TEXT /* Reference to the price list the price belongs to */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Reference to the region the price applies to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the price was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_currency_code FOREIGN KEY ("currency_code") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_price_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_list_id") REFERENCES price_lists ("price_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_history" (
  "history_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each inventory change */,
  "inventory_id" TEXT /* Reference to the inventory record that was changed */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product variant the inventory belongs to */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Reference to the region the inventory applies to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variant in stock */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_history_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_history_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_history_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product accessed */,
  "variant_id" TEXT /* ID of the product variant accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the action was performed on */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "customer_segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_list_customer_segments" (
  "price_list_id" TEXT /* Reference to the price list */,
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_list_id", "customer_segment_id")
)
